project_claim: source observables are measurements, not controls
difference: This project audits source-side localization failure in one OACI artifact family, not all DG algorithms
what_not_to_claim: do not claim universal DG failure

project_claim: invariance is not enough under conditional shift/gauge
agreement: conditional shift can defeat invariant representations
difference: C56 is empirical EEG-DG evidence, not their theorem
what_not_to_claim: do not claim a formal lower bound already proved

project_claim: invariance target is still useful as contrast
agreement: IRM motivates invariant correlations across environments
difference: C56 finds the relevant target endpoint boundary is not made available by source invariance alone
what_not_to_claim: do not claim IRM is invalid generally

project_claim: same-label endpoint closure must not be reused as action evidence
difference: C56 does not perform post-selection inference; it uses this as a guardrail
what_not_to_claim: do not call same-label diagnostic an action rule

difference: C56 only proposes future theorem candidates
